titles.en: It is Not Permitted to Give Charity to the Hashemites Except in Two Conditions
It is Not Permitted to Give Charity to the Hashemites Except in Two Conditions

segments: : حدثنا أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمد بن أحمد، عن يوسف بن الحارث، عن محمد بن عبدالرحمن العرزمي، عن أبيه، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه عليهم السلام قال: لا تحل الصدقة لبني هاشم إلا في وجهين: إن كانوا عطاشا وأصابوا ماء فشربوا، وصدقة بعضهم على بعض
arabic.text: : حدثنا أحمد بن إدريس، عن محمد بن أحمد، عن يوسف بن الحارث، عن محمد بن عبدالرحمن العرزمي، عن أبيه، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه عليهم السلام قال: لا تحل الصدقة لبني هاشم إلا في وجهين: إن كانوا عطاشا وأصابوا ماء فشربوا، وصدقة بعضهم على بعض

segments: 2-88 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ahmad ibn Idris quoted Muhammad ibn Ahmad, on the authority of Yusuf ibn al-Harith, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Abdul Rahman al-Arzami, on the authority of his father, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) , “It is not permitted to give charity to the Hashemites except in two conditions: they can be given water to drink when they are thirsty, and one of the Hashemites can give charity to another one.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 2-88 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Ahmad ibn Idris quoted Muhammad ibn Ahmad, on the authority of Yusuf ibn al-Harith, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Abdul Rahman al-Arzami, on the authority of his father, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) , “It is not permitted to give charity to the Hashemites except in two conditions: they can be given water to drink when they are thirsty, and one of the Hashemites can give charity to another one.”

narratorChain.raw: 2-88 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال
